expectations.text: Hero contains a business-specific animated visual (van, dog, grooming items)
expectations.evidence: Hero uses a static 🐶 emoji only — no van SVG, no animations, no flying grooming tools

expectations.text: Page uses dark background (#0d0d0d or similar dark color)
expectations.evidence: background:#f8f9fa — light grey theme, not dark

expectations.text: Uses a non-default accent color appropriate for pet/health industry
expectations.evidence: #16a34a green used for buttons and logo

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'Mobile Dog Grooming That Comes to You' = 7 words

expectations.text: Stats/social proof section with at least 3 numbers present
Service grid with at least 4 cards each having icon, title, description
expectations.evidence: 6 service cards with emoji, h3, and p present

expectations.text: Final CTA section with form input and button
expectations.evidence: CTA section with zip input and Check Availability button

expectations.text: Navigation bar is fixed/sticky with backdrop blur
expectations.evidence: header is sticky but has no backdrop-filter blur
No @keyframes animations defined anywhere in the CSS
